body.title: Move Igor runtime logs from ~/.TheIgors/local/logs/ to ~/.agent_datacenter/logs/Igor-wild-0001/
body.proposal: Igor wants to edit wild_igor/igor/brainstem/core_patterns.py (HIGH inertia). Plan: . Reason: HIGH inertia write requires human approval: wild_igor/igor/brainstem/core_patterns.py
body.description:
Igor's runtime logs live at ~/.TheIgors/local/logs/ (pe_chain.log, cognition.log, etc — 30+ files). The agent_datacenter canonical log tree puts Igor logs at ~/.agent_datacenter/logs/Igor-wild-0001/. They are not the same location. T-adc-instance-home-migration moved the instance home but the log path was not updated.

Fix: update the log path configuration (wherever LOG_DIR or log file paths are set in Igor's config/paths module) to point to AGENT_DATACENTER_HOME/logs/Igor-wild-0001/. Symlink ~/.TheIgors/local/logs/ → new path for backward compat during transition (existing tooling that reads from old path keeps working). Update any hardcoded paths in log rotation, audit steps, or day-close references.

**Affected files:** wild_igor/igor/ paths module or config (wherever log dir is set), lab/claudecode/ tooling that reads from ~/.TheIgors/local/logs/ (audit_runner.py, day-close-audit skill)
**Design rules:** docs-in-code. No new schemas.
**Scope boundary:** IN: log dir config update + backward-compat symlink. OUT: log rotation policy changes, historical log migration.
**Test plan:** After change, verify pe_chain.log appears at ~/.agent_datacenter/logs/Igor-wild-0001/pe_chain.log. Verify old path still works via symlink. Run one Igor turn and confirm new log entry at new path.
